Contact Rare & Manuscript Collections

Cornell University Media Services Photo Section records, 1943-1989.
Collection Number: 21-37-2227

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library

DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

Title:
Cornell University Media Services Photo Section records, 1943-1989.
Repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Collection Number:
21-37-2227
Abstract:
Extension Bulletins with photographs annotated to give Media Services negative numbers. Also photographs of New York State Fair and Farm and Home Week exhibits. File cabinets with negative files and card files by subject.
Creator:
Cornell University. Media Services. Photo Section
Quanitities:
20 cubic feet.
Language:
Collection material in English
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION

Extension Bulletins with photographs annotated to give Media Services negative numbers. Also photographs of New York State Fair and Farm and Home Week exhibits. File cabinets with negative files and card files by subject.
INFORMATION FOR USERS
Cite As:

Cornell University Media Services Photo Section records, #21-37-2227. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
SUBJECTS

Names:
Cornell University -- : Description -- : Views.
New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences
New York State College of Human Ecology
Subjects:
Agriculture -- Study and teaching
Form and Genre Terms:
Negatives.
Photographs.
CONTAINER LIST
Container
Description
Date
Series I. Subject Cards and Negatives
Scope and Contents
2 filing cabinets containing 4x5 and smaller negatives and 60 card boxes (Boxes 39-98) of corresponding file cards containing subject, thumbnail photograph, date and negative number. Negatives in chronological (negative #) order. File cards organized by subject. Drawer list available.
